member.name: T:PluginRegistration.Attributes.CrmCustomApiRequestParameterAttribute
member.summary: Declares a request parameter for a Custom API plugin type.

member.name: P:PluginRegistration.Attributes.CrmCustomApiRequestParameterAttribute.ApiUniqueName
member.summary: Links the parameter to a specific Custom API when the class implements multiple APIs. Defaults to the only Custom API on the class.

member.name: T:PluginRegistration.Attributes.CrmCustomApiResponsePropertyAttribute
member.summary: Declares a response property for a Custom API plugin type.

member.name: P:PluginRegistration.Attributes.CrmCustomApiResponsePropertyAttribute.ApiUniqueName
member.summary: Links the response property to a specific Custom API when the class implements multiple APIs.

member.name: T:PluginRegistration.Attributes.CrmPluginRegistrationAttribute
member.summary: Declares how a plugin type should be registered in Dataverse.

member.name: M:PluginRegistration.Attributes.CrmPluginRegistrationAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Custom API registration — only the unique API name is required.

member.name: P:PluginRegistration.Attributes.CrmPluginRegistrationAttribute.CustomApiBindingType
member.summary: Custom API binding type. Applies only to Custom API registrations.

member.name: P:PluginRegistration.Attributes.CrmPluginRegistrationAttribute.IsFunction
member.summary: When true, the Custom API is exposed as an OData Function (GET).

member.name: P:PluginRegistration.Attributes.CrmPluginRegistrationAttribute.IsPrivate
member.summary: When true, the Custom API is hidden from $metadata and code generation tools.

member.name: P:PluginRegistration.Attributes.CrmPluginRegistrationAttribute.BoundEntityLogicalName
member.summary: Required when is Entity or EntityCollection.

member.name: P:PluginRegistration.Attributes.CrmPluginRegistrationAttribute.AllowedCustomProcessingStepType
member.summary: Controls whether other plug-in steps can extend this Custom API message.

member.name: P:PluginRegistration.Attributes.CrmPluginRegistrationAttribute.Name
member.summary: Step name override. When omitted, deploy resolves it as {namespace}.{class}.{stage}.

member.name: T:PluginRegistration.Attributes.CrmPluginStepImageAttribute
member.summary: Declares a pre/post image for a plugin step on the same class. Link the image to a step using and optionally .

member.name: P:PluginRegistration.Attributes.CrmPluginStepImageAttribute.Message
member.summary: Optional SDK message name. Use when the class registers multiple steps on the same stage.
